gauge.name: Nantahala River near Hewitt

impacts.statement: PARTS OF WEST HIGHWAY 19 AND HEWITTS ROAD WILL BE FLOODED. FEREBEE MEMORIAL PICNIC AREA WILL BE FLOODED.
LOW LYING AREAS ALONG WEST HIGHWAY 19 NEAR HEWITTS RD WILL BEGIN TO FLOOD. FURTHER FLOODING OF FEREBEE MEMORIAL PINIC AREA WILL OCCURR.
FEREBEE MEMORIAL PICNIC AREA WILL LIKLY BE FLOODED.

dataAttribution.title: Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
